positive: A whimsical, stylized depiction of celestial forest fauna: a glowing stag with iridescent antlers, surrounded by floating bioluminescent flora and delicate, intertwined roots. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centralized, featuring deep indigo and teal tones contrasted with glowing gold and emerald accents. Use a clean silhouette style, inspired by Art Nouveau and mystical woodland etchings. The overall mood is ethereal, magical, and sophisticated, perfect for apparel printing. Crisp lines, high contrast, digital illustration, flat design elements integrated with organic realism, volumetric lighting.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, grain, photo, cinematic, realistic photo, logo, trademark, copyrighted characters
